name: Heliox Engine Overseer
languages: understands Common, Elvish, and Modron but can't speak
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

trait.name: Overclock Authority
entries: While within 10 feet of a linked engine or control panel, the Heliox Engine Overseer can use a bonus action to gain 10 temporary hit points. While it has these temporary hit points, it has advantage on Constitution saving throws.

trait.name: Damage Threshold Handler
entries: If the Heliox Engine Overseer is conscious and actively operating a mobile fortress engine console, that fortress's damage threshold increases by 5.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Heliox Engine Overseer makes two Arcane Arc attacks.

action.name: Arcane Arc
entries: {@atk rs} {@hit 8} to hit, range 90 ft., one target. {@h}18 ({@damage 4d6 + 4}) lightning damage.

action.name: Shock Pulse (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Each creature of the overseer's choice within 20 feet must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 ({@damage 4d10}) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

action.name: Emergency Repairs (1/Day)
entries: While at an engine panel, the Heliox Engine Overseer restores 30 hit points to one construct vehicle subsystem or linked mechanical installation.
